UNH.reasoning: UNH is a no-trade zone for breakout strategy. The consolidation breakout fired weeks ago near $281-283, and the measured-move target (~$331) has been surpassed by over 12%. Current price at $370.48 is 23.85% above the 50-SMA with RSI-14 at 97.45 and RSI-7 at 98.07 — extreme overbought extension. Bollinger Band width is 0.35 (already wide/expanded), confirming the move is well underway and no squeeze is forming. Daily volume is 0.74x the 20-day average (below the required 1.5x threshold). ADX at 84.15 is extreme trend — this is a runaway trend, not a breakout setup. No consolidation range or defined S/R zone exists at current price; nearest resistance is null (new multi-month highs), nearest support is $276.29, which is far below current price. Wiki confirms: 'No setup — no-trade zone. Parabolic extension, not a consolidation or breakout pattern.' Hourly squeeze is absent (BB width 0.088), hourly volume 0.17x average. Range: none identifiable at current price. Volume ratio: 0.74x (fail). Squeeze status: done/expanded. All three breakout conditions fail simultaneously.

Confidence capped at 62 due to: (1) volume not yet at 1.5x threshold, (2) no confirmed close below $223.78 yet, (3) price at resistance but not yet breaking down. Entry is on confirmed breakdown, not at current price.
